title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Crossword Bookstores

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Crossword Bookstores
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Crossword Bookstores in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Crossword Bookstores:
Crossword Bookstores is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crossword Bookstores!
